TERRAIN.description: Natural ground - grass, dirt, sand, snow

dirt_grass_corner.description: Corner transition between dirt and grass

t_road_asphalt_straight.description: Road with yellow dashed center line

water.description: Water that blocks movement - can swim with ability

lava.description: Dangerous lava terrain - damages on contact

wood_wall.description: Wooden wall - blocks movement and light

wall_brick.description: Wall made out of grey bricks

door_brick_wall.description: Door set into a brick wall - can open/close

door_closed_wall_brick.description: Closed door in brick wall state

door_opened_wall_brick.description: Open door in brick wall state

tree.description: Large tree - blocks movement but not sound

OBJECTS.description: Interactive objects like chests and switches

signpost.description: Readable sign - displays text when interacted

signpost_wooden.description: Wooden sign board with readable text

notice_board.description: Board for posting notices and messages

blocker.description: Invisible collision barrier - blocks movement only

PARTICLES.description: Place particle effects on the map

weather_leaves.description: Triggers falling leaves effect while placed

script.description: Invisible overlay that runs custom JavaScript. Right-click to edit.

LOGIC.description: Logic gates, timers, counters, and teleporters

timer.description: Delays activation signal by configurable seconds

and_gate.description: Outputs when ALL inputs are active

or_gate.description: Outputs when ANY input is active

ROOFS.description: Roof tiles that cover areas beneath - renders on top layer

roof_wooden.description: Simple wooden roof - covers area beneath

roof_thatch.description: Rustic thatch roof - covers area beneath

roof_stone.description: Heavy stone roof tiles - covers area beneath

roof_slate.description: Dark slate roof tiles - covers area beneath

FURNITURE.description: Indoor furniture items - tables, chairs, sofas, kitchen elements

DECORATIONS.description: Native-resolution images. Placed at grid, rendered at full image size. Bottom-left anchor.

deco_placeholder.description: Placeholder decoration tile - replace with your own assets
